name: Dutch Oven Cobblers
recipeIngredient: Favorite flavoring for fruit (cinnamon, almond, etc)
recipeInstructions:
First, start fire early so as to have plenty of hot coals. Actually an oven set at 350°F will do in a pinch.
Then line a 4-quart cast iron Dutch oven with aluminum foil. If doing this on a bed of coals, use the type of Dutch oven that has feet and a flat lid with a lip to hold the coals.
Mix fruit with about 1/2 cup of the cake mix and chosen flavoring, placing it in the Dutch oven. Mix the remaining cake mix and can of Eagle Brand milk together and pour over the fruit/cake mixture.
Place cover on, place on top of a bed of coals, and put a heaping shovelful of coals on top. Alternatively, place in an oven.
Cook for 45 minutes to an hour (check after 40 minutes).
